author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Plan: commit the GH#576 implementation as one logical unit. 7 files: new .github/workflows/container-image.yml (multi-arch musl build matrix, develop->:nightly, v*->:version+:latest, PR build-only, smoke-verify with manifest jq assertion); Dockerfile + entrypoint.sh both de-hardcoded for arch via TARGETARCH/dpkg; .gitignore excludes container/crosslink-* artifacts; justfile gets build-image + push-image recipes; launch.rs format_container_launch_error helper with 5 unit tests covering positive cases (not found / denied / no such image / case-insensitive) and the anti-misdirection negative case; docs_src/guides/container-agents.qmd updated to reflect the GHCR-published reality and the new local recipe. Conventional commit message refs both the GH#576 upstream issue and the local #727 design issue. Architect verdict: APPROVE.
